hero.title: Technology That Actually Works for Your Business
hero.subtitle: From websites to automation, we figure out what your business actually needs — then build it. No jargon, no fluff, no projects that go nowhere.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Technology consulting, websites, custom apps, process automation, and CRM — one team, one conversation to figure out where to start.

consulting.title: Technology Consulting
consulting.description: Not sure where to start? We look at how your business runs today and tell you exactly what technology would help — and what would just waste your money.

websites.title: Website Development
websites.description: A website that doesn't bring in business is just an expense. We build sites that load fast, look professional, and actually move people to act.

webapps.title: Web Applications
webapps.description: When your business outgrows spreadsheets and generic software, we build the custom tool that fits exactly how you work.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: Every time your team does the same repetitive task, that's time and money leaving the business. We connect your tools and automate the busy work so your team can focus on what matters.

crm.title: CRM Implementation
crm.description: Most CRM projects fail because the software isn't set up for how you actually sell. We configure HubSpot, Zoho, or whatever fits your team — so your pipeline runs itself.

about.title: We're a Small Team. We Prefer It That Way.
about.description: CFT Services is a technology consulting firm based in Puerto Rico. We work with businesses of all sizes to modernize their operations, build reliable software, and automate the processes that eat up your team's time. We're not here to sell you a platform you don't need. We start by understanding your business — what you're trying to do, what's in the way, and what the fastest path forward looks like.

projectsCompleted.label: Projects Completed
projectsCompleted.description: Delivered across industries in Puerto Rico and beyond

satisfiedClients.label: Satisfied Clients
satisfiedClients.description: Businesses that came back for the next project

howWeDoIt.title: How We Do It
howWeDoIt.subtitle: We start with a real conversation, not a proposal

assessment.title: Requirements Assessment
assessment.description: We start with a real conversation. No proposals before we understand your business, your constraints, and what success looks like for you.

recommendations.title: Strategic Recommendations
recommendations.description: We recommend only what you actually need. If you don't need a custom app, we'll tell you. If there's a simpler path, we'll take it.

implementation.title: Implementation
implementation.description: We build, integrate, and train your team — and stay available after launch. The project doesn't end when the invoice does.

industries.title: Industries We've Impacted
industries.subtitle: We've helped businesses across various sectors modernize and grow through technology

work.title: Work We've Shipped
work.subtitle: A few live projects we designed, built, and handed over to clients who are using them today.

project1.title: Titi Amanda Babysitter
project1.description: A professional website for a babysitter service — with service details, booking info, and real parent testimonials. Simple, trustworthy, and built to convert first-time visitors into inquiries.

project2.title: Clinica Libelula
project2.description: A clean, credible website for a health clinic — service listings, team profiles, and appointment flow. Designed to work as well on a phone as on a desktop.

project3.title: CRM & AI Document Automation
project3.description: Connected OneDrive, Zoho CRM, and AI agents into a single pipeline that reads incoming documents, creates contacts, and routes tasks automatically — zero manual entry.

project4.title: Automated Sales Report
project4.description: A monthly report automation that pulls sales data from ATH Móvil Business and Clover, aggregates everything, and emails a formatted summary. What used to take hours now takes zero.

project5.title: MAC Educando
project5.description: Website for M Adviser and Consultant Inc., an educational services center in Puerto Rico. Features smooth scroll navigation, dark/light theme, and animated sections showcasing their services, careers, and contact information.

contact.title: Not Sure What You Need? That's Fine — Start Here.
contact.subtitle: Send us a message describing your challenge — not a perfect brief, just the honest situation. We'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.name: Name
contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.

finalCta.title: Ready to Stop Guessing and Start Building?
finalCta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call. We'll listen, ask the right questions, and tell you exactly what we'd recommend — no pitch, no pressure.

footer.tagline: Technology that actually works for your business.
